title: magnolia hodgsonii
intro: Magnolia hodgsonii, also known as the Bornean magnolia or Hodgson's magnolia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Magnoliaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves of the Magnolia hodgsonii plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
